title: Global Control System Simplification / Intuitive UI Consistency
control_patterns_normalized: segmented controls for Agenda day and week modes
stepper controls for Agenda navigation and Disponibilidade mobile navigation
quiet help actions normalized to Ajuda buttons
shared primary, secondary, neutral and link-style actions across main screens
explicit disabled-looking navigation states instead of ambiguous low-contrast pills
dark_mode_visibility_improvements: Agenda segmented and stepper controls now keep filled surfaces, visible borders and readable inactive text in dark mode
top-of-screen control clusters use the same button sizing, spacing and border treatment across the sandbox
help buttons remain quiet without disappearing against dark surfaces
light_mode_visibility_improvements: Agenda active and inactive controls preserve readable fill and border contrast after theme toggle
shared button variants keep the same visual hierarchy in light mode without relying on transparent borders
help and neutral actions remain readable without competing with the primary action layer
action_hierarchy_changes: Revisar and Aprovar are visually elevated as primary actions where operator intervention matters
Voltar, Cancelar and Limpar use the secondary treatment
Simular and Salvar no sandbox use neutral or primary sandbox-safe emphasis depending on the task
Ajuda was demoted to a quieter reference action instead of competing CTAs
mobile_behavior: control clusters stack into full-width rows below tablet widths
Agenda segmented controls and stepper controls expand to grid layouts on mobile
Disponibilidade mobile navigation keeps usable tap targets and no horizontal overflow
preserved_prior_behavior: v4 six-layer decision hierarchy on Hoje
v5 light and dark themes with localStorage key aris_benchuix_theme
v6 shared Rafael M. exception and approval reflection into Agenda
v7 responsive layout with no horizontal overflow at 320, 375, 480, 768 and 1024 widths
v8 focused-day mobile navigation in Disponibilidade
v9 onboarding, empty states, failure states and sandbox scenario selector
v10 Help local search, filter and expand-collapse behavior
v11 consistency between Perdido, Estimativa and Recuperável
v13 simplified Agenda control cluster intent
v14 semantic split between Dia and Semana in Agenda
validation_performed: local HTTP availability check for the latest preview endpoint
local HTTP availability check for the v15 validation harness
headless local load and verification via http://127.0.0.1:8124/validate_v15.html
headless local load and verification via http://127.0.0.1:8124/validate_v15_latest.html
byte-for-byte equality check between the v15 draft and barbearia_dashboard_latest.html
